description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring a combination of brick and glass exterior walls. The front facade includes a driveway with a parked car, a main entrance door, and landscaped greenery flanking the path. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically around the structure, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and a grill, bordered by low hedges. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof, and a garage or carport integrated into the design. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with a focus on open, functional living spaces and outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern, flat-roofed single-story bungalow with brick and glass walls, landscaped front yard, and a rear patio with outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, car, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, side windows, and partial view of the interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area with outdoor furniture, grill, and large glass doors.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the patio, side rooms, and the transition between front and back yards.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass panels and grouped side windows
